title: Kassar Kosciusko

'''Kassar Kosciusko''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Tarro]] [[Assassin/Legends|assassin]] who later became the owner and proprietor of the [[Royal K Hotel and Casino]] on [[Kwenn Space Station/Legends|Kwenn Space Station]] as well as a secret undercover operative of the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]].

==Biography==
Kassar Kosciusko was born in the [[Standard year/Legends|year]] [[73 BBY]]. He became an [[Assassin/Legends|assassin]] and in [[20 BBY/Legends|20 BBY]] he encountered five [[Loag]] assassins on the East side of [[Luj City]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Novor 23]]. Both the Loag and Kosciusko were assigned the same target to kill and Kosciusko ended up also eliminating the Loag assassins, although he received a long scar in the process. Kassar Kosciusko was a friend of [[Meysen Kayson]], having saved Kayson's life on [[Pernam Minor]]. Shortly after the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], Kosciusko was known as "Mr. K," the owner and operator of a [[Casino/Legends|casino]] that was located on [[Kwenn Space Station/Legends|Kwenn Space Station]]. He gathered resources and information under the guise of being an aggressive businessman however by [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]] he was secretly feeding information to [[Alliance Intelligence/Legends|Alliance Intelligence]]. His skills as an assassin were sometimes used as well and he was responsible for the "mysterious disappearance" of [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] [[Chorkun]].<ref name="CRO" />

Kosciusko kept a cell of [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] operatives on Kwenn Station, but their activities were often disrupted by [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]]-aligned spy [[Derrida/Legends|Derrida]]. After foiling at least five Rebel operations in Kwenn, Derrida became Kosciusko's personal nemesis.<ref name="air">''[[Alliance Intelligence Reports]]''</ref>

==Personality and traits==
Kosciusko was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Tarro]] with [[Color/Legends|dark green]] skin, dark blue [[Hair/Legends|hair]], and bright yellow [[Eye/Legends|eyes]]. He had a mouthful of sharp teeth that he could use to intimidate others and his body also had a long scar. He wore elegant clothing that complemented his muscular physique and also wore long flowing cloaks.<ref name="CRO" />

==Skills and abilities==
Kosciusko was a skilled combatant being highly trained in using [[Blaster/Legends|blasters]], [[Melee weapon/Legends|melee weapons]], or using his fists. He was very strong, fast and physically fit. He was very in tune with the operations of Kwenn Space Station. For social skills Kosciusko was adept at both intimidation and persuasion and was an effective leader and business owner. Finally Kosciusko was skilled at riding [[Swoop/Legends|swoops]], especially the [[Nebulon-Q Swoop Racer|Nebulon-Q]].<ref name="CRO" />

==Equipment==
Kosciusko wore expensive tailored clothes and cloaks. He also carried a [[Heavy blaster pistol/Legends|heavy blaster pistol]], a [[stun cloak]] and an [[Ar'gor]] blade.<ref name="CRO" />

==Behind the scenes==
Kassar Kosciusko was designed by [[Craig Robert Carey]] and [[J. Michael Denbo|Michael Denbo]] for ''[[Cracken's Rebel Operatives]]'', a supplement for the ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]'' that was published by [[West End Games]] in [[1994]]. He was illustrated by [[Mike Vilardi]].
